case_title: MEDA HAF SMALL PROPERTIES, LLC VS. DAMARIS MEJIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEDA HAF SMALL PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, DAMARIS AYALA, JOSE TINAJERO, ARTURO AGUILAR, OFELIA MARTINEZ, JUAN
